name: Chicken Divan
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (10 oz each) frozen broccoli, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Stir in flour and whisk until smooth.
3. Gradually add chicken broth, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
4. Remove from heat and stir in heavy cream, sherry, salt, and pepper.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. In a baking dish, spread the cooked broccoli evenly.
7. Pour half of the sauce over the broccoli.
8. Arrange chicken slices on top of the broccoli.
9. Cover with remaining sauce and sprinkle Parmesan cheese.
10. Bake for 20-30 minutes, or until the chicken is heated through and the casserole is bubbly.
